title: Fix Close Button Overlap in Metrics Analyst Modal
story: As a DataTools Pro user, I want the close button in the Metrics Analyst modal to not overlap with other elements, so that I can easily close the modal without visual confusion.
description: The close button in the Metrics Analyst modal overlaps with adjacent UI elements, causing a visual UX issue. The button positioning needs to be adjusted to prevent overlap.
acceptance_criteria: Close button does not overlap with any other UI elements
Close button is properly positioned in the upper right of the modal
Close button remains accessible and clickable
ux_changes: Fixed the close button positioning in the Metrics Analyst modal to eliminate overlap with adjacent elements.
comment_summary: Developer fixed the overlap issue on staging.
